name: git-diff-view
when_to_use: 需要在 React 中查看带文件名、语言、完整 unified patch 与长文件高亮的 GitHub 风格 diff 时用它而非手写虚拟表格,因为原生在 patch 解析、长 diff 行模型和语法高亮叠加上失败;非做任意两字符串自动求差、可编辑 merge 或代码执行。
why_valuable: AI 默认做不到把完整 unified patch、两侧文件内容、语法 token 与长 diff 行模型稳定合成同一视图;手写表格在大文件和多 hunk 下会失去对齐。

en.when_to_use: Use it when React needs to display a GitHub-style diff with filenames, languages, a complete unified patch, and highlighting for long files instead of hand-writing a virtual table. Native implementations fail on patch parsing, long-diff line models, and layered syntax highlighting. It is not for automatically diffing arbitrary strings, editable merges, or code execution.
en.why_valuable: AI cannot reliably combine a complete unified patch, both file contents, syntax tokens, and a long-diff line model into one view. Hand-written tables lose alignment on large files and multiple hunks.

data_in.note: The name hunks is easy to misread: each item is not a separate array of lines, but a complete unified diff string producible by git diff, including ---/+++ file headers and @@ hunk headers. oldFile/newFile default to empty objects when omitted.

oldFile?.fileLang?: string|null - inferred from the filename by default, falling back to txt
oldFile?.content?: string|null - complete old-file content, default empty string

newFile?.fileLang?: string|null - inferred from the filename by default, falling back to txt
newFile?.content?: string|null - complete new-file content, default empty string

schema.hunks: string[] - each item is one complete unified diff text; [] when there are no differences
schema.diffViewHighlight?: boolean - whether to syntax-highlight, default false

spec.note: The diff table wrapper uses an explicit height of 400px and overflow:auto so a long patch does not break the carrier. AI may change the pixel value, but vh and percentage heights are prohibited (hard rule 3).

data_in.note: hunks 名称易误读:每个元素不是单独的行数组,而是一份可由 git diff 产生、含 ---/+++ 文件头与 @@ hunk header 的完整 unified diff 字符串;oldFile/newFile 省略时默认空对象。

oldFile?.fileLang?: string|null —— 默认从文件名推断,失败则 txt
oldFile?.content?: string|null —— 完整旧文件内容,默认空字符串

newFile?.fileLang?: string|null —— 默认从文件名推断,失败则 txt
newFile?.content?: string|null —— 完整新文件内容,默认空字符串

schema.hunks: string[] —— 每项为一份完整 unified diff 文本;无差异时 []
schema.diffViewHighlight?: boolean —— 是否语法高亮,默认 false

spec.note: diff 表格外层显式 height 400px 并 overflow:auto,避免长 patch 撑穿载体;AI 可改像素值但禁 vh/百分比高(铁律 3)。

boot.codex: 同 artifact(sandbox iframe):加载 pure CSS 后用 React createRoot 渲染 DiffView;data.hunks 必须是完整 unified diff 字符串数组。

example._why: hunks 的真实输入是完整 unified diff 而非“变更行列表”,属于高歧义配置,最小样例用来钉死文件头与 @@ header。

peer.note: 本组件消费 unified diff 而不替未知字符串自动求差;可先用 jsdiff 的 createTwoFilesPatch 产出 hunks[0],再交给本条渲染。

carriers.widget: supported:React ESM + pure CSS,按 boot 将 CSS 落 shadow;默认关闭语法高亮以减轻大文件成本
carriers.codex: supported:React ESM + CSS CDN,无必需 uplink/wasm

isolation.evidence: @git-diff-view/react@0.1.7 +esm(67KB,document.* 未被别名化,负计数可信)grep:0 document.head、0 document.body、0 createElement(style/link)、0 insertRule、0 document/window.addEventListener、0 Worker。样式为独立静态文件 diff-view-pure.css,widget boot 将其落入 shadowRoot;React 19 事件挂在传入 root(shadow 内)。add-widget/portal 特性 opt-in 且默认关闭。
